strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across Node.js/TypeScript and React, exceeding the 6+ year bar
Current role at re:cinq explicitly involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++, Python-adjacent) plus MongoDB, Docker, Git, and TDD/CI discipline
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned anywhere in the resume
Vitest not listed; testing background leans on Selenium and D-language tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
No clear PostgreSQL or major cloud platform (AWS/GCP/Azure) depth beyond a brief AWS CDK mention at Optilyz
response.justification: Candidate clearly exceeds the seniority and full-stack breadth required: a decade-plus of Node.js/TypeScript and React work (Optilyz, RIDE, WatchUp), strong engineering-practices background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based at RIDE), and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, which maps to the role's AI agent requirement. Database (MongoDB) and Docker/Kubernetes (GISCollective) are evidenced, and AWS CDK appears at Optilyz. The gaps are framework-specific: no Nest.js or Vitest experience is stated, and PostgreSQL/cloud depth is thin — all learnable for a senior of this caliber but worth probing in interview.
